blog_title: Bulk Plain Tshirt First Order Mistakes — How ₹2 Lakh & 1500 Pieces Went Wrong in 2017
caption:
₹2 lakh order. 1500 pieces. All wrong. 😬

I skipped samples in 2017. GSM was 170, not 200. Sizes off by an inch. 200 pieces arrived creased. That was ₹25,000 down the drain.

Before your next bulk order: get samples, weigh the GSM yourself, measure the size chart. Don't be me.

Save this if you're sourcing for your printing business 👇
